MaxLineLength:BackupPayloadCodec.kt$BackupPayloadCodec$require(length in 0..maxEntryBytes && length <= input.available()) { "Backup blob is too large or truncated" }
MaxLineLength:BackupScreens.kt$"Backups are encrypted offline and contain all passes and 2FA secrets. External file references are not included."
MaxLineLength:BackupScreens.kt$"Use at least ${BackupCrypto.MIN_NEW_PASSPHRASE_LENGTH} characters. This passphrase cannot be recovered."
MaxLineLength:BackupScreens.kt$Text("cancel", color = Grey, fontSize = 24.sp, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().then(tapModifier { resetToMenu() }))
MaxLineLength:BackupScreens.kt$append("\n$skipped ${if (skipped == 1) "pass needs" else "passes need"} a newer Paka and will be dropped.")
MaxLineLength:Barcodes.kt$Barcodes$canvas.drawRect(left, top, left + (r.width * modulePx).toFloat(), top + (r.height * modulePx).toFloat(), paint)
MaxLineLength:CardStore.kt$CardStore$warning = "Passes were read but could not be encrypted. Plaintext was preserved and editing is disabled."
MaxLineLength:CardStore.kt$CardStore$warning = if (recovered.fromBackup) "Passes were recovered from the previous encrypted backup." else null
MaxLineLength:CardStore.kt$CardStore$warning = if (recovered.fromBackup) "Passes were recovered from the previous plaintext backup." else null
MaxLineLength:CardStore.kt$CardStore$warning = listOfNotNull(legacyLoad.warning, "Passes were migrated to encrypted storage.").joinToString(" ")
MaxLineLength:DetailScreens.kt$"Select up to two files at once. References stay external and are not encrypted or backed up by Paka."
MaxLineLength:DetailScreens.kt$Text("add anyway", color = White, fontSize = 24.sp, modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().then(tapModifier(onConfirm)))
MaxLineLength:DetailScreens.kt$if (onUpdate(card.copy(name = savedName, notes = notes.trim(), stack = stack.trim().ifBlank { null }, references = references))) onBack()

MaxLineLength:EntryScreens.kt$Toast.makeText(context, "Photo passes are unavailable in demo mode", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()

MaxLineLength:MainActivity.kt$Text("Passes and 2FA codes, carried lightly.", color = White, fontSize = 20.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal)

MaxLineLength:MainActivity.kt$Text("Swipe between pages. Open a pass, then long-press it for details. Data stays encrypted on this phone.", color = White, fontSize = 20.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal)
MaxLineLength:MainActivity.kt$Text("Tap + to scan. Long-press + to enter manually.", color = White, fontSize = 20.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal)
MaxLineLength:MainActivity.kt$Text(if (demoModeEnabled) "Paka · demo" else "Paka", color = White, fontSize = 16.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal)

MaxLineLength:SettingsScreens.kt$"Latvian for “package”. Saves passes and carries 2FA codes in a light way. Long-presses may reveal more options."
